What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
M
Maria S.

RB Construction did an amazing job installing new fiber cement siding on my Victorian in the Haight. The crew was professional, efficient, and the finished product looks fantastic. They really paid attention to the details and made sure everything was perfect. Highly recommend!

D
David K.

I had some damaged wood siding on my home in Noe Valley due to water damage. RB Construction came out quickly and repaired the siding seamlessly. You can't even tell there was any damage. Great service!

J
Jennifer L.

We recently hired RB Construction to replace the old vinyl siding on our home in the Sunset District. The team was very helpful in choosing a new siding style and color that complemented our home's architecture. The installation was smooth and the results are stunning!

M
Michael B.

RB Construction installed fiber cement siding on my home. The team was knowledgeable and professional, and the siding looks great. I feel much more confident about the protection of my home now.

RB Construction General Contractor — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every siding contractor project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The RB Construction General Contractor Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific siding contractor needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving San Francisco & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout San Francisco, CA and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

San Francisco Oakland Berkeley Daly City San Mateo Redwood City South San Francisco San Bruno
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our siding contractor services.

What type of siding is best for San Francisco's climate?

Fiber cement siding is highly recommended for San Francisco due to its durability, resistance to moisture, and ability to withstand temperature fluctuations. Vinyl siding is a cost effective option too. We can assess your home and provide a recommendation.

How long does siding installation typically take?

The duration of siding installation depends on the size and complexity of the project. A typical project can take anywhere from 1-3 weeks. We'll give you a project timeline during the initial consultation.

Do you offer warranties on your siding installations?

Yes, we offer comprehensive warranties on both the siding materials and our workmanship, providing you with peace of mind and long-term protection for your investment.

Built on San Francisco Values

Get a free, no-obligation siding consultation. Call RB Construction now.
